title: ITALY enforcement action against Hanako s.r.l. (2,000)
summary: Insufficient technical and organisational measures to ensure information security The Italian DPA has imposed a fine of EUR 2,000 on Hanako s.r.l. The controller had been using a video surveillance system. The controller failed to install adequate information signs to inform data subjects regarding the processing. Furthermore, the video s...
